facets.description: This facet measures the extent to which a conversation turn expresses sincerity and authenticity.

facets.description: This facet measures the extent to which a conversation turn indicates a failure to express one's needs, wants, or opinions in a direct and clear manner.

facets.description: This facet measures the degree to which a conversation turn reflects kindness, empathy, and genuine interest in others' well-being.

facets.description: This facet measures the extent to which a conversation turn exhibits rudeness, contempt, or a lack of regard for others.

facets.description: This facet measures the extent to which a conversation turn demonstrates openness, honesty, and transparency in communication.

facets.description: This facet measures the respectfulness, courtesy, and moral integrity displayed in a conversation turn.

facets.description: This facet measures the degree to which a person's conversation turn is characterized by warmth, friendliness, and a positive attitude towards others.

facets.description: This facet measures the extent to which a person treats others fairly and justly in the conversation.

facets.description: This facet measures the extent to which a conversation turn reflects confidence, self-worth, or a positive self-image.
